meta.general_notes: Most ingredient nutrient values were obtained from the Canadian Nutrient File (CNF). Ingredients not available in CNF, such as iodized salt, were sourced from USDA FoodData Central.

calculation_assumptions.chloride_from_salt: For iodized salt, chloride content was calculated from sodium assuming sodium chloride composition (Cl = Na × 1.54).
calculation_assumptions.missing_values: Nutrients not reported in the source data are stored as null.
calculation_assumptions.chloride_coverage: Chloride values are generally unavailable in food composition databases and remain null for most ingredients.
calculation_assumptions.unit_standardization: Ingredient nutrient units were aligned with those used in the FEDIAF nutritional guidelines to allow direct comparison between calculated nutrient totals and recommended nutrient levels.
calculation_assumptions.missing_data_handling: Certain ingredients (e.g., supplements and iodized salt) intentionally include only a subset of nutrients relevant to their use. These ingredients are flagged to exclude them from missing-data warnings, as null values reflect intentionally unrecorded nutrients rather than absent or incomplete source data.

supplement_methodology.description: Supplements not available in CNF or USDA FoodData Central were manually added for use in the calculator.
supplement_methodology.naming_convention: Ingredients with the suffix '_avg' represent supplements whose nutrient values were calculated as averages from several commercial dog supplement products.
supplement_methodology.display_convention: These ingredients appear in the interface with the label '(supplement, averaged)' to distinguish them from food ingredients sourced from CNF.
supplement_methodology.calculation_method: Primary nutrients typically supplied by each supplement (e.g., calcium, fat, EPA, DHA) were averaged from values listed on multiple commercial supplement products. Nutrients not reported on product labels were recorded as null.
